prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
raw_response: {"task_completion": false, "data_retrieval_accuracy": true, "generalized_result_verification": false, "agent_sequence_correct": false, "clarity_and_justification": false, "hallucinations": true, "suggestions": "Review DGA diagnosis and match it correctly to failure mechanisms; justify sensor prioritization based on failure mode characteristics"}

parsed_dims.suggestions: Review DGA diagnosis and match it correctly to failure mechanisms; justify sensor prioritization based on failure mode characteristics
